Here are the FHIR queries to find all patients with **Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD)**:

```
// ICD-10-CM: F10.x – Alcohol-related mental and behavioral disorders (hierarchical search)
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F10&_include=Condition:patient

// SNOMED CT: Alcohol use disorder
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|7200002&_include=Condition:patient

// SNOMED CT: Alcohol dependence syndrome
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|15167005&_include=Condition:patient

// SNOMED CT: Harmful use of alcohol
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|198286006&_include=Condition:patient
```

---

### Notes:

| Code System | Code | Description |
|---|---|---|
| ICD-10-CM | F10 *(`:below`)* | All alcohol-related disorders (F10.10–F10.99) |
| SNOMED CT | 7200002 | Alcohol use disorder / Alcoholism |
| SNOMED CT | 15167005 | Alcohol dependence syndrome |
| SNOMED CT | 198286006 | Harmful use of alcohol |

- The `:below` modifier on `F10` captures **all subcategories** (abuse, dependence, intoxication, withdrawal, etc.) without listing each code individually.
- `_include=Condition:patient` retrieves the associated **Patient** resources in the same bundle.
- Combine results and deduplicate by patient to get the full AUD population.

## FHIR Queries: AUD Identification via Condition + MedicationRequest Union

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|7200002,http://snomed.info/sct|66590003&clinical-status=active,recurrence,relapse&_include=Condition:patient

MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1815&status=active&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

---

### Query Breakdown

#### Path A — Condition (SNOMED CT, two distinct AUD concepts)

| Parameter | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| `code` | `snomed\|7200002` | **Alcoholism** — chronic pattern, distinct SNOMED concept |
| `code` *(OR'd)* | `snomed\|66590003` | **Alcohol dependence** — physiologic dependence syndrome |
| `clinical-status` | `active,recurrence,relapse` | Captures current burden; excludes historical resolved entries |
| `_include` | `Condition:patient` | Pulls Patient resources for downstream cohort assembly |

> ⚠️ **Concept note:** `7200002` (Alcoholism) and `66590003` (Alcohol dependence) are siblings in the SNOMED hierarchy — not parent/child — so both must be enumerated explicitly; a single ancestor query would miss one.

---

#### Path C — MedicationRequest (RxNorm, naltrexone ingredient)

| Parameter | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| `code` | `rxnorm\|1815` | Naltrexone **ingredient-level** RxNorm code — catches all formulations (oral tablet, extended-release injectable Vivitrol®, etc.) |
| `status` | `active` | Limits to current prescriptions |
| `_include` | `MedicationRequest:patient` | Pulls Patient resources for union join |

---

### Union Logic & Known Confounders

```
Final AUD Cohort ≈ (Path A results) ∪ (Path C results)
```

| Segment | Description | Action |
|---|---|---|
| **A only** | Diagnosed AUD, not on naltrexone | Include — confirmed AUD |
| **A ∩ C** | Diagnosed AUD + naltrexone Rx | Include — confirmed AUD on pharmacotherapy |
| **C only** | Naltrexone Rx, no AUD diagnosis | ⚠️ **Review required** — naltrexone is dual-indicated for **opioid use disorder** (OUD); these patients need chart adjudication before AUD attribution |

> 💡 To reduce C-only OUD contamination, cross-reference the naltrexone-only cohort against `Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|5602001` (Opioid dependence) or `http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F11.20` to flag likely OUD patients for exclusion.

## FHIR Queries — Alcohol Use Disorder (SNOMED Variants)

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|7200002&_include=Condition:subject
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|66590003&_include=Condition:subject

```

---

### Code Reference

| SNOMED CT Code | Concept Display | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `7200002` | **Alcoholism** | Classic/historical term; widely used in clinical records |
| `66590003` | **Alcohol dependence syndrome** | ICD-10-aligned; maps to F10.2x |
| `15167005` | **Alcohol abuse** | Lower-severity end of the spectrum; maps to F10.1x |

---

### Key Design Notes

- **`_include=Condition:subject`** pulls the linked `Patient` resource in the same Bundle, avoiding a second round-trip.
- Three separate queries are used because FHIR R4 standard search does not support OR across code values in a single `code=` parameter on all servers *(though FHIR R4B/R5 and some servers support `code=A,B,C` comma-OR syntax — see alternative below).*
- All three codes are **clinical descendants** of the broader SNOMED hierarchy for *"Mental and behavioural disorders due to use of alcohol"*.

---

### Alternative: Single-Query (Comma-OR, server-permitting)

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|7200002,http://snomed.info/sct|66590003,http://snomed.info/sct|15167005&_include=Condition:subject
```

> ⚠️ Comma-OR on `token` parameters is supported by many FHIR servers (e.g., HAPI FHIR) but is **not universally guaranteed** — verify against your server's CapabilityStatement.
